name: Patient Case
history: Longstanding difficult interactions with the patient's mother. Strained communication and delayed sharing of significant events within the family.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I don't communicate perfectly, I will be misunderstood and rejected.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't change the way my family interacts with me.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of communication and emotional withdrawal.
situation: Preparing for an upcoming visit from parents.
auto_thought: This visit will be stressful and I will feel trapped.
